summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Franck Rouane Photography website. All new features working perfectly: hero animations, scroll animations, collections preview, ecology awareness sections, and responsive design.
passed_tests: Home page hero section with fade-in animations and scroll indicator
About section with scroll animations and image loading
Collections Preview section with 2 collections (Calanques, Couchers de Soleil)
Ecology section with stats (2M+, 25%, +20cm), surtourisme alert, and 4 action cards
All navigation links functional (Accueil, Collections, Boutique, À Propos, Blog, Contact)
Collections page with filters and collection display
Calanques gallery with 60 photos and detailed ecology block with 4 tabs
Sunset gallery with 22 photos and ecology section
Ecology tab functionality (Espèces Protégées, Menaces, Bonnes Pratiques, Agir)
Collection navigation and back buttons working
